transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Would you like to stop by the campus coffee shop before class?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: I'd love to, but I need to finish printing my assignment first.

transcript.question_intro: Why doesn't the woman want to go to the coffee shop now?

questions.prompt: Why doesn't the woman want to go to the coffee shop now?

choices.text: She needs to print her assignment first.

questions.explanation: She says she must finish printing her assignment before going.
questions.evidence: I need to finish printing my assignment first.
